title: Large Workspace
objective: A user state with many workspace files, used to detect synchronous filesystem scans and startup stalls.

setup.title: Write Large Workspace
setup.intent: Create many workspace files with nested directories.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const home=process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME; const root=path.join(home,"workspace","kova-large"); for (let d=0; d<30; d++) { const dir=path.join(root,`dir-${d}`); fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true}); for (let f=0; f<30; f++) fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,`file-${f}.md`),`# Kova ${d}/${f}\n`.repeat(20)); }'

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes state fixture files
